query: SELECT season, viewName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM espn_season_cache GROUP BY season, viewName HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yMVuFXFfyKno5zd.8bace71a6706 --database D7EDTbt5uXwnUBkJHewERh --execute SELECT season, viewName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM espn_season_cache GROUP BY season, viewName HAVING cnt > 1;
